cases.title: TopBar sign-out clears stored JWT and redirects to /login
preconditions: Web app running with TopBar user menu per app-layout-components
User signed in with valid credentials and JWT stored client-side
User on any authenticated page (participant or organizer shell)
steps: Open TopBar user menu and select sign out
Observe browser URL after action completes
Inspect client session storage for persisted JWT
cases.expected: Client clears stored JWT; browser navigates to /login per Flow 0b step 5; satisfies FR-34 client session clearing on sign-out

cases.title: After sign-out TopBar reflects unauthenticated state
preconditions: User previously signed in; TopBar account button showed display name
Sign-out completed via TopBar user menu
steps: Observe TopBar on /login page after sign-out
Verify account menu trigger no longer shows signed-in display name
Confirm login page is reachable without redirect loop
cases.expected: TopBar no longer presents signed-in user chrome; display name hidden; user is in unauthenticated state consistent with cleared client session

cases.title: GET /api/v1/me without Authorization returns 401 after client session cleared
preconditions: User obtained valid JWT via POST /auth/login
Client session cleared (simulating sign-out: no Authorization header sent)
steps: GET /api/v1/me without Authorization bearer header
Inspect HTTP status and response envelope
cases.expected: HTTP 401 with standard unauthenticated error envelope; no profile or role data returned; cleared client session cannot access session endpoint per API design §2.6

cases.title: GET /api/v1/me/registrations without Authorization returns 401 after sign-out
preconditions: Participant had registrations while signed in
Client session cleared simulating TopBar sign-out
steps: GET /api/v1/me/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 without Authorization bearer header
cases.expected: HTTP 401; paginated registration data not exposed; protected self-service endpoint rejects cleared session per AC-15

cases.title: MVP sign-out is client-side only with no server revocation endpoint
preconditions: API server running at /api/v1
API design §2.6 auth endpoints available
steps: Inspect published auth routes for POST /auth/logout or equivalent revocation endpoint
Confirm documented auth surface includes register, login, and GET /me only (plus dev token when enabled)
cases.expected: No server logout/revocation endpoint in MVP; sign-out contract is client-side JWT clearing per API design §2.6; FR-34 fulfilled without backend session invalidation

cases.title: Sign-out simulation via omitted bearer matches unauthenticated middleware rejection
preconditions: Valid JWT previously issued via login
Integration test harness can call protected routes with and without Authorization header
steps: GET /api/v1/me with valid JWT and confirm HTTP 200
GET /api/v1/me with Authorization header omitted (client sign-out state)
Compare error code to never-authenticated request
cases.expected: Omitted bearer after sign-out yields HTTP 401 UNAUTHENTICATED equivalent to fresh unauthenticated request; auth middleware enforces authentication before domain logic per authorization decision pattern step 1

cases.title: After sign-out unauthenticated caller denied on role-restricted organizer endpoint
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin previously signed in and signed out (client JWT cleared)
Event with audit log entries exists
No Authorization header on request
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/audit-logs without bearer token after sign-out simulation
cases.expected: HTTP 401 before role or scope checks; audit logs not returned; unauthenticated actor denied per permission matrix §2 (read audit logs requires OrganizerAdmin) and authorization pattern step 1

cases.title: Organizer session sign-out clears role context and redirects to login
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin or OrganizerStaff account signed in via /login
User viewing organizer shell with role-aware navigation
steps: Select sign out from TopBar user menu while in organizer area
Observe redirect destination
Attempt to navigate directly to an organizer-only route
cases.expected: JWT cleared; redirect to /login; organizer routes no longer accessible without re-authentication; role and event-scope context removed from client session

cases.title: Participant can sign out and sign back in to restore protected access
preconditions: Participant signed in and has viewed My Registrations at least once
Known credentials for the account
steps: Sign out from TopBar user menu
Navigate to /login and sign in with original credentials
Open My Registrations
cases.expected: Sign-out clears session; re-login issues new JWT; protected route accessible again; signup → login → view flow repeatable across sessions per AC-16 and Flow 0b

cases.title: After sign-out client cannot perform sensitive operations without re-authentication
preconditions: Participant signed in with at least one event registration
Sign-out completed clearing client JWT
steps: While on /login after sign-out, attempt to navigate to My Registrations
If any in-flight or cached UI triggers API calls, observe responses
cases.expected: Protected routes redirect to /login; API calls without refreshed token return 401; sensitive operations blocked until user re-authenticates per NFR-07

cases.title: Double sign-out from login page is idempotent
preconditions: User completed sign-out and is already on /login
No stored JWT in client session
steps: If sign-out control is still reachable, trigger sign-out again
Otherwise refresh /login and confirm no error state
cases.expected: No application error or redirect loop; user remains on /login in unauthenticated state; repeated sign-out is safe and idempotent

cases.title: After sign-out direct navigation to protected route redirects to login with return URL
preconditions: User signed out via TopBar; JWT cleared
Route guards enabled per page-list guidance
steps: Navigate directly to a protected participant route such as /my-registrations
Observe browser URL and page content
cases.expected: User redirected to /login; intended destination preserved as return URL query parameter; protected page content does not render; consistent with AC-15 unauthenticated route handling after FR-34 session clear

cases.title: Retained JWT string still authenticates server until expiry in MVP (no revocation)
preconditions: User logged in and JWT value captured before client sign-out
MVP has no server-side token revocation per API design §2.6
steps: Clear client session (sign-out simulation)
GET /api/v1/me using the previously captured JWT in Authorization header
cases.expected: Server may still return HTTP 200 with profile because MVP does not revoke tokens on sign-out; documents security boundary that FR-34 clears client session only and callers must not reuse stored tokens client-side

cases.title: Browser back navigation after sign-out does not restore authenticated protected view
preconditions: User signed in and visited a protected page
User signed out via TopBar and landed on /login
steps: Use browser back button to return to prior protected page URL
Observe whether protected content renders or redirect occurs
cases.expected: Route guard detects missing JWT and redirects to /login; protected content not shown from stale history entry; session remains cleared per FR-34
